shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g 'package.json' -g 'src/**' -g 'tests/**' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && sed -n '1,180p' package.json"

/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "Calendar|renderCustomHeader|showMonthYearPicker|monthsShown|monthHeader|prevMonth|nextMonth" src/index.tsx src/popper_component.tsx src/calendar.tsx src/month.tsx src/test/calendar_test.test.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx | head -240'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '820,1030p' src/calendar.tsx && sed -n '1,120p' src/popper_component.tsx && rg -n \"renderCustomHeader|showMonthYearDropdown|monthHeaderPosition\" src/index.tsx src/popper_component.tsx src/*.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '300,460p' src/calendar.tsx && sed -n '1,130p' src/stylesheets/datepicker.scss && rg -n \"month-container|header\" src/stylesheets/datepicker.scss | head -80 && sed -n '1,120p' src/index.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '598,650p' src/calendar.tsx && node_modules/.bin/tsc --project tsconfig.build.json --noEmit && node_modules/.bin/jest src/test/calendar_test.test.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx --runInBand"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "monthHeaderPosition react-datepicker local month header navigation" --space default'

/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/prettier --check src/calendar.tsx src/month.tsx src/index.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx && node_modules/.bin/jest src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx --runInBand'

/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/prettier --write src/calendar.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx && node_modules/.bin/tsc --project tsconfig.build.json --noEmit && node_modules/.bin/jest src/test/calendar_test.test.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx --runInBand'
/bin/bash -lc 'git remote -v && git log --all --oneline --decorate -8 -- src/calendar.tsx src/month.tsx && git diff --stat && git diff --check'

/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/eslint src/calendar.tsx src/month.tsx src/index.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx && node_modules/.bin/prettier --check src/calendar.tsx src/month.tsx src/index.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx && git diff --check'

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "react-datepicker now supports monthHeaderPosition (top, middle, bottom). Calendar retains shared top navigation by default; middle/bottom builds a per-month header containing the existing label, dropdown/custom-header rendering, and navigation handlers, while Month controls placement around its day grid. This preserves min/max disabling and multi-month independence without duplicating navigation logic." -t "react-datepicker local month header positioning" --unit-type decision -l label_react-datepicker -l label_calendar -s codex -i 0.7 --space default'

/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && git diff --check && nl -ba src/calendar.tsx | sed -n '185,255p;595,635p;720,755p;920,1070p;1095,1135p;1258,1280p' && nl -ba src/month.tsx | sed -n '135,150p;1165,1200p' && nl -ba src/index.tsx | sed -n '280,300p' && nl -ba src/stylesheets/datepicker.scss | sed -n '205,220p'"

/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/prettier --check src/calendar.tsx src/month.tsx src/index.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx && node_modules/.bin/tsc --project tsconfig.build.json --noEmit && node_modules/.bin/jest src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx --runInBand && git diff --check'
